title: Monitor my team activity
excerpt: Hi, I´ve been exploring for over a month how to see my team perfomance in the matter of how many tasks have been completed or not, by whom, who´s behind on their tasks, etc. I´ve been trying dashboards, table widget, my …

posts.author: Vegonik (VERONICA MARIA POMPA ACUNA)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I´ve been exploring for over a month how to see my team perfomance in the matter of how many tasks have been completed or not, by whom, who´s behind on their tasks, etc. I´ve been trying dashboards, table widget, my week view, search options but I always find some sort of limitation. If someonw has successed on this, please let me know, thanks in advance.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: I. If you see in the news section there Is a new app developed for your use case. Take a look.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m not sure where you mean. Can you give a link?

posts.author: Vegonik (VERONICA MARIA POMPA ACUNA)
posts.cookedHtml: yeah, I couldn´t find it either
